title: Pan-Seared Trout with Norwegian Herbs
description: A simple and flavorful dish made with pan-seared trout, infused with the aromas of Norwegian herbs. This dish is perfect for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: Season the trout fillets with salt and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the trout fillets for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes.
While the trout is cooking, mix the chopped parsley and dill in a small bowl.
Remove the skillet from the oven and sprinkle the herb mixture over the trout.
Serve the trout hot, garnished with additional herbs if desired.
